message: fix(helpers): honor explicit target home without passwd lookup

files.patch:
@@ -369,6 +369,11 @@ changelog_resolve_explicit_target_home() {
 
     if [[ -n "$_CHANGELOG_EXPLICIT_TARGET_USER_RAW" ]]; then
         changelog_is_valid_username "$_CHANGELOG_EXPLICIT_TARGET_USER_RAW" || return 1
+        target_home="$_CHANGELOG_EXPLICIT_TARGET_HOME"
+        if [[ -n "$target_home" ]]; then
+            printf '%s\n' "${target_home%/}"
+            return 0
+        fi
         target_home="$(changelog_existing_abs_home "$(changelog_home_for_user "$_CHANGELOG_EXPLICIT_TARGET_USER_RAW" 2>/dev/null || true)" 2>/dev/null || true)"
         [[ -n "$target_home" ]] || return 1
         printf '%s\n' "${target_home%/}"

@@ -321,6 +321,11 @@ cheatsheet_resolve_explicit_target_home() {
 
   if [[ -n "$_CHEATSHEET_EXPLICIT_TARGET_USER_RAW" ]]; then
     cheatsheet_is_valid_username "$_CHEATSHEET_EXPLICIT_TARGET_USER_RAW" || return 1
+    target_home="$_CHEATSHEET_EXPLICIT_TARGET_HOME"
+    if [[ -n "$target_home" ]]; then
+      printf '%s\n' "${target_home%/}"
+      return 0
+    fi
     target_home="$(cheatsheet_existing_abs_home "$(cheatsheet_home_for_user "$_CHEATSHEET_EXPLICIT_TARGET_USER_RAW" 2>/dev/null || true)" 2>/dev/null || true)"
     [[ -n "$target_home" ]] || return 1
     printf '%s\n' "${target_home%/}"
